infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: YumShare needs access to your photos so you can set a cover image for a recipe or cookbook.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: YumShare needs access to your camera so you can take a photo for a recipe or cookbook cover.

plugins.photosPermission: YumShare needs access to your photos so you can set a cover image for a recipe or cookbook.
plugins.cameraPermission: YumShare needs access to your camera so you can take a photo for a recipe or cookbook cover.
